name: micropoliscore
description: MicropolisCore monorepo — WASM engine, packages/, apps (Micropolis, VitaMooSpace), VitaMoo libraries

scripts.test: pnpm --filter vitamoo run build && pnpm --filter mooshow run build && pnpm --filter mooshow run test && pnpm --filter @micropolis/sims-io run build && pnpm --filter @micropolis/sims-io run test && pnpm --filter micropolis run test
